context_values.name: body
context_values.summary: Request body value available during route execution.
notes: Initially stored as a raw string when present.
After `parse-json`, it may become a structured JSON value.

context_values.name: path.params
notes: Route params are also inserted as flat top-level variables such as `id`.

context_values.name: ___last_exec_result___
context_values.summary: Stores the last builtin or step result used by response resolution and related flows.

path_resolution.summary: Runtime expressions resolve variables and nested data through a shared path lookup model.
notes: Bracket lookups allow variable-driven path segments.
Missing values typically resolve as absent rather than throwing path exceptions.
Different builtins may choose different fallback behavior after lookup fails.

behavior: `expr` is resolved through the runtime path lookup model.
unknown placeholders remain unchanged in log messages.
